description: 5-email onboarding drip for new ReportForge trial users. Converts free-trial to paid.

emails.subject: Your first intelligence brief is waiting
emails.body_html:
Hey {{subscriber.first_name | default: 'there'}},

Welcome to ReportForge AI — the fastest path from market question to market intelligence.

Start here:

  1. Go to your dashboard: {{your_app_url}}
  2. Enter a market you're curious about (specific beats broad)
  3. Hit generate — your brief is ready in under 60 seconds

Quick tip: Try a market you already know well first. You'll be both impressed and usefully surprised by what surfaces.

Your first report is on me.

— The ReportForge Team

P.S. Hit reply and tell me what you're analyzing. I read every response.

emails.subject: How Marcus closed a $12,000 contract in 48 hours
emails.body_html:
Hey {{subscriber.first_name | default: 'there'}},

Marcus is a freelance strategy consultant. Before ReportForge AI, writing market context for a proposal took him half a day.

Last week a client called — entering the pet insurance market in Germany. Needed a brief by Friday.

Marcus ran one ReportForge report. 60 seconds. Used it as the research backbone for his proposal.

He won the $12,000 contract.

"I now spend proposal time on strategy — the part clients actually pay for."
— Marcus D., Freelance Consultant

What market are you looking at right now?

Generate your next report →

— The ReportForge Team

emails.subject: 3 things users didn't expect about ReportForge
emails.body_html:
Hey {{subscriber.first_name | default: 'there'}},

Three things that consistently surprise new users:

1. It handles hyper-niche markets
Not just "electric vehicles" — try "electric cargo bikes for last-mile delivery in Southeast Asia." You get real dynamics, not generic filler.

2. The risk matrix is decision-ready
Risks structured by probability × impact. A framework, not just a list.

3. You can run 10 markets in an hour
Founder Sarah ran 7 market validation reports in one session, ranked them by opportunity gap and competition density, and picked her winner. From idea to decision: under 2 hours.

How many markets have you analyzed so far? Hit reply — genuinely curious.

— The ReportForge Team

emails.subject: The $500/hour problem hiding in your workflow
emails.body_html:
Hey {{subscriber.first_name | default: 'there'}},

How much is your time worth per hour?

How long does market research normally take you — from scratch?

If you're spending 2–4 hours on research ReportForge handles in 60 seconds, you're losing real money on every sprint.

Our Pro users run ~8 reports/month. That's 16–32 hours recovered. Monthly.

One upgrade unlocks: unlimited reports, API access, custom branding for client deliverables.

Upgrade to Intelligence — $79/mo →

— The ReportForge Team

emails.subject: Founding member pricing closes in 48 hours
emails.body_html:
Hey {{subscriber.first_name | default: 'there'}},

When we publicly launch next week, ReportForge AI goes to standard pricing.

Until then, founding members lock in $49/month for the Intelligence plan (normal price: $79) — permanently.

Last time we're offering this.

Lock in founding member pricing →

What you get:

  • ✅ Unlimited reports (no monthly cap, ever)
  • ✅ API access — embed reports into your own tools
  • ✅ Custom branding — your logo on client deliverables
  • ✅ Priority generation queue
  • ✅ All future features included

48 hours. Then it's gone.

— The ReportForge Team
